docket_entries.description: AMENDED PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100010758) FILED BY PETITIONER SHI, CINDY SHU-WAY AS TO RESPONDENT AMERIPRISE FINANCIAL SERVICES

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CINDY SHI'S MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM FEBRUARY 24, 2016 TO APRIL 11, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION. PETITIONER IS GRANTED LEAVE TO FILE A SINGLE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF LIMITED SOLELY TO THE APPLICABILITY OF CCP SEC. 1290.4 AND THE FEDERAL ARBITRATION ACT, WHICH MAY BE FILED NO LATER THAN MARCH 9, 2016. RESPONDENT MAY FILE A RESPONSIVE BRIEF BY MARCH 30, 2016. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, William C. Dresser, Esq. (408-279-7529) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party, Cindy Shu

Attorney, Martha C. Luemers of Dorsey & Whitney LLP (650-857-1717) appears as counsel for respondent/opposing party, Ameriprise Financial Services

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER CINDY SHI'S Motion For Reconsideration is DENIED. Petitioner fails to offer a persuasive reason why the new evidence she relies on was not included in the papers she previously filed in support of her petition to vacate the arbitration award. Moreover, even considering the new evidence submitted by Ms. Shi, that evidence does not establish that the arbitrators committed misconduct by denying her requests for a continuance. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Reynolds of Shustak Reynolds & Partners, P.C. telephone number 619-696-9500 for Petitioner Cindy Shi.
Martha Luemers of Dorsey & Whitney LLP telephone number 650-857-1717 for Respondent/Cross-Petitioner Ameriprise Financial Services, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PETITIONER CINDY SHI'S Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to fees and costs, and denied as to all other respects. Counsel will work on a form of order and prepare one single judgment (two motions on calendar).

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Continued To Apr-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JONAH A. TOLENO, ESQ. of Shustak Reynolds & Partners P.C., Tel No. 619-696-9500 appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. GABRIELLE M. WIRTH, ESQ. of Dorsey & Whitney LLP, Tel No. 714-800-1455 appearing for Respondent Ameriprise Financial Services.

Matter argued by counsel. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: PETITIONER CINDY SHI'S Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award is continued to April 11, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Petitioner is granted leave to file a single supplemental brief limited solely to the applicability of CCP Sec. 1290.4 and the Federal Arbitration Act, which may be filed no later than March 9, 2016. Respondent may file a responsive brief by March 30, 2016. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
